⚡ About Us

Reliable Electrical
Maintenance & Repairs

Somersault Electrical is a family-run business based in Willoughby, NSW, specialising in domestic electrical installations, maintenance, data, and phone services. We service the Lower North Shore, Northern Beaches, and Sydney CBD, with a focus on strata, residential, and retail projects.

General electrical maintenance and repairs
Smoke alarm testing and replacement
Lighting, switches, and power points
Appliance installations
Switchboard upgrades and fault finding
Emergency electrical works

Working Hours

8am – 8pm
Monday to Saturday
